content: The Artificial Intelligence course covers machine learning, deep learning, NLP, and computer vision with hands-on projects.
AI program focuses on building intelligent systems using data, neural networks, and real-world applications.
The Artificial Intelligence course costs ₹120,000.
The fee for the Artificial Intelligence course is ₹120,000.
AI course fees are ₹120,000.
The duration of the Artificial Intelligence course is 6 months.
AI course runs for 6 months.
The Artificial Intelligence course is offered in hybrid mode.
Eligibility requires a bachelor's degree with basic math and programming knowledge.
Placement support includes resume building, mock interviews, and hiring partnerships.
Career options include AI Engineer, Machine Learning Engineer, and Data Scientist.
The Data Science course focuses on data analysis, visualization, and machine learning techniques.
This program teaches how to extract insights from data using Python, SQL, and visualization tools.
The Data Science course costs ₹100,000.
The fee for the Data Science course is ₹100,000.
Data Science course fees are ₹100,000.
The duration of the Data Science course is 5 months.
The Data Science course is offered online.
Eligibility requires basic statistics and programming knowledge.
Placement support includes portfolio building and interview preparation.
Career opportunities include Data Analyst and Data Scientist roles.
The Web Development course covers frontend and backend technologies to build modern web applications.
This course teaches full-stack development using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and Node.js.
The Web Development course costs ₹80,000.
Web Dev course fees are ₹80,000.
The Web Development course lasts 4 months.
The Web Development course is conducted offline.
Eligibility requires 12th pass with basic computer knowledge.
Placement support includes portfolio building and job referrals.
Career options include Frontend, Backend, and Full Stack Developer roles.
The Cybersecurity course focuses on protecting systems through ethical hacking and security practices.
This program teaches penetration testing, cryptography, and threat detection techniques.
The Cybersecurity course costs ₹110,000.
Cybersecurity course fees are ₹110,000.
The Cybersecurity course duration is 5 months.
The Cybersecurity course is offered in hybrid mode.
Basic networking knowledge is required.
Placement support includes certification guidance and job assistance.
Career roles include Security Analyst and Ethical Hacker.
The Cloud Computing course covers AWS, Azure, and cloud infrastructure management.
This course teaches cloud deployment, DevOps integration, and containerization tools like Docker.
The Cloud Computing course costs ₹90,000.
Cloud course fees are ₹90,000.
The Cloud Computing course lasts 4 months.
The Cloud Computing course is offered online.
Eligibility requires basic IT and networking knowledge.
Placement support includes certification preparation and job assistance.
Career options include Cloud Engineer and DevOps Engineer.
The UI/UX Design course focuses on creating user-friendly and visually appealing digital interfaces.
This program covers design thinking, wireframing, prototyping, and usability testing.
The UI/UX Design course costs ₹70,000.
UI/UX course fees are ₹70,000.
The UI/UX Design course duration is 3 months.
The UI/UX Design course is conducted offline.
No prior experience is required.
Placement support includes portfolio review and mock interviews.
Career roles include UI Designer, UX Designer, and Product Designer.
